name: Flyu Prime RPG
description:
Welcome to the Flyu Empire! Humanity has long since been enslaved as well as dozens of other races. But is it all as perfect as it seems?

In this RPG, you'll be given several entries into the universe where you'll have to decide your fate. Will you rebel? Become another cog in the machine? Maybe you'll flag down a member of imperial high command and marry into royalty? The choice is yours!

All world building is in lorebooks that trigger flawlessly during roleplay as things come up. The definitions in personality are so the bot knows which characters to pull. However, there are other characters you may summon.

Who are these characters? What's their deal? You'll have to ask them and find out!

USE CHAT MEMORY/WRITE LONG RESPONSES!!!
This bot works best with Chat memory. Be sure to put this in your bot:

[{{user}} notes:
Name:
Age:
Race:
Appearance:
Gender:
Reputation:
Friends:
Enemies:
Affiliation: ]

(For example:
[{{user}} notes: Name: BO8 Age: 69 Race: Flyu Appearance: blue skin blue hair pointed ears, tall.
Gender: male, he/him Reputation: he's known for his good looks and bad luck. Friends: none. Enemies: rebels! Affiliation: empire!]

By putting this in your chat memory, characters will know how to interact with you and you'll have a more tailored experience!


🌅☄️🔵🏙️𖥔⋆⭒˚.⋆.Flyu Prime ⋆⭒˚.⋆.𖥔 ݁🏙️🔵☄️🌅

This is a multi scenario bot!

The first intro is going to introduce you to the world vaguely and give you ideas for how to proceed. The rest are random scenarios with some characters active in a scene. These intros are shorter. Click around and find what resonates with you!

Tips for this bot!

  • If you're using JLLM, you should consider typing out all your actions in intro 1 instead of choosing one of the options and nothing else. Sometimes, JLLM won't work well if you don't give it a quality answer. Deepseek and other larger models can handle one word answers, however.

  • Read the description so you know what characters you can call! SAY NAMES TO TRIGGER CHARACTERS!!!!

  • If the character you want to chat with isn't there, just put them in the scene!

  • Go to flyuuters! An awesome strip club <3

  • Most scenes give a hint of danger. Follow the danger and see where it takes you!

  • Join the rebellion and take down the emperor!

  • Join the local enforcers! (as a human or flyu!)

  • Become a spoiled pet

  • Be an alien ruler and adopt a pet!

  • Play as a royal flyu visiting from another colony

🌅☄️🔵🏙️𖥔⋆⭒˚.⋆.Flyu Prime ⋆⭒˚.⋆.𖥔 ݁🏙️🔵☄️🌅

TW: Mentions of: enslavement, sex work, space, aliens, sex, dehumanization, rebellion, police, police brutality.
creator: cricketsounds
